## Required manual startup wiring

- Register services with `builder.Services.AddAdminApiOperationalHealthProbes(builder.Configuration);`.
- Map endpoints with `api.MapOperationalHealthProbeEndpoints();`.
- Liveness endpoint: `/health/live`.
- Readiness endpoint: `/health/ready`.
